title: The South Bird Hunt
description: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now keep quiet and answer me.

summary: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
